description_long: This stereo sound system features a rectangular, upright cabinet with a dark, matte exterior finish. The front face displays two prominent circular speaker drivers, one above the other, set within a recessed panel. Above the speakers, there is a compact control panel area with several small buttons and possibly a knob, as well as a red accent that may indicate a power or input section. The sides and back of the unit are plain, with no visible ports or additional features. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on function over decorative elements. The object appears sturdy and is likely constructed from a combination of wood or MDF for the enclosure and metal or plastic for the speaker grilles and control components.
description: A tall, rectangular stereo sound system with two large front-facing speakers and a compact control panel above them, finished in a dark matte color. The sides and back are plain, emphasizing a functional, robust design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large circular speakers and a small control panel with buttons and a red accent above the speakers.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing a plain, featureless surface with no visible controls or ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, unadorned back panel with no visible connectors or features.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a plain surface and no visible controls or ports.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles are circular and appear to have a fine mesh or perforated metal pattern, with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A small rectangular control panel is located above the speakers, featuring several small buttons and possibly a knob, with a red accent section.
